verses.text: Tua ahih ciangin Josef pai-in Faro' kiangah, “Ka pa leh ka sanggamte a tuuhon uh leh a bawnghon uh leh a neih khempeuh uh tawh Kanaan gam panin hong pai uh a, amaute tu-in Goshen gamah om uh hi,” ci-in a gen hi
A sanggamte' lak panin amah in mi nga la-in Faro' kiangah va paipih hi
Faro in a sanggamte kiangah, “Na nasep uh bang ahi hiam?” na ci hi. Amaute in Faro' kiangah, “Ka pate uh mah bangin na nasem kote pen gankemte ka hi uh hi,” a ci uh hi

Amaute in Faro kiangah, “Hih gamah tawlkhat a om dingin kong pai uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Kanaan gamah kialpi nasia lua ahih manin tua lai-ah na nasemte' tuuhonte-a' ding lonona om nawnlo hi. Tu-in kong thum uh hi. Goshen gamah na nasemte hong tengsak in,” a ci uh hi
Tua ciangin Faro in Josef kiangah, “Na pa leh na sanggamte na kiangah hong tung khin hi

Egypt leitang khempeuh nangma thu ahi hi. Na pa leh na sanggamte lei hoihna penah tengsak in. Goshen leitangah amaute tengsak in. Amaute' lakah a hih thei mi na muh leh ka ganhingte a kem dingin koih in,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Josef in a pa Jakob tumpihin Faro' mai-ah koih a, Jakob in Faro thupha a pia hi
Faro in Jakob kiangah, “Na nuntak kum bangzah pha ta ahi hiam?” na ci hi
Jakob in Faro kiangah, “Tawlkhat sung ka nuntak hun pen kum za leh kum sawmthum ahi hi. Ka nuntak hun tom sungah siatna bekbek om a, ka pate tawlkhat a omsung uh a nuntak hunte ban nailo hi,” a ci hi
Jakob in Faro thupha pia-in tua lai panin a paikhia hi
Tua ciangin Faro' thupiaksa bangin Josef in leitang a hoihpen, Rameses leitang, Egypt gam sungah neihsa pia-in a pa leh a sanggamte a tengsak hi
Josef in a pa, a sanggamte, leh a pa' innkuante khempeuh a ne ding zah tawh kizui-in an a pia hi.
Tu-in kialpi nasia mahmah ahih manin gam khempeuhah an om nawnlo a, kialpi hangin Egypt mite leh Kanaan mite vulgawp uh hi
Amaute in antang a leina hangin, Egypt gamsung leh Kanaan gamsunga sum khempeuh Josef in ngah khin hi. Josef in Faro' inn-ah tua sumte paipih hi

Egypt gamsung leh Kanaan gamsunga sum a bei khit ciangin Egypt mite khempeuh Josef kiangah hong pai-in, “Kote an hong pia in. Bang hangin na muhna-ah si ding ka hi uh hiam? Bang hang hiam cih leh ka sum uh beita hi,” a ci uh hi
Josef in dawngin, “Na ganhingte uh hong pia un. Na sum uh bei ahih leh na ganhingte uh khekna-in an kong pia ding hi,” na ci hi

Tua ahih ciangin amaute in Josef kiangah a ganhingte uh paipih uh hi. Josef in sakolte, tuuhonte, bawnghonte, leh late a khekna-in amaute an a pia hi. A ganhingte uh khekna-in Josef in tua kum sung amaute an a pia hi

Tua kum a bei, a kum kik ciangin amaute Josef kiangah hong pai-in, “Ka sum uh a bei khitna ka topa uh tungah kong im kei ding uh hi. Ganhing honte ka topa-a' ahi hi. Ka pumpi uh leh ka leitang uh cih simloh ka topa' muhna-ah bangmah dang om nawnlo hi

Bang hangin kote si-in ka leitang uh nangma muhna-ah maimawk ding ahi hiam? Kote leh ka leitang uh an tawh hong lei in. Kote, Faro' sila ka hi ding uh a, ka leitang uh zong ama-a' hi ding hi. Leitang mawkval loin, kote si loin ka hin' theihna dingun khaici hong pia in,” a ci uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin Josef in Egypt gam khempeuh Faro-a' dingin a lei hi. Kialpi nasia lua ahih manin Egypt mi khempeuh in a lote uh a zuak uh hi. Leitang khempeuh Faro-a' suak khin hi
Mihingte ahih leh, Egypt mongkhat panin a mongkhat dongin amah in sila-in bawl hi

Siampite' leitang bek amah in lei lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh siampite in Faro' tung panin a kiciangtan zah an ngah uh a, amaute tungah Faro in a piak tawh amaute nungtazo uh ahih ciangin amaute in a leitang uh zuak lo uh hi
Tua ciangin Josef in mite kiangah, “En un, tuni-in note leh na leitang uh Faro-a' dingin kong lei hi. Tu-in hih lai-ah no-a' dingin khaici om a, note in leitang tungah na vawh ding uh hi
Anlak ciangin Faro' tungah nga-ah khat na pia ding uh a, nga-ah li pen lo-ah khaici ding, note leh na innkuanpihte uh leh na tate uh' an dingin na tang ding uh hi,” a ci hi
Amaute in, “Nang in ka nuntakna uh nong honkhia khinzo hi. Ka topa uh lungdam hen; kote pen Faro' sila ka hi ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin Faro in nga-ah khat nei ding hi cihna, tuni donga a om, Egypt leitang tawh kisai-in Josef in ngeina kip khatin a bawl hi. Siampite' leitang bek Faro-a' suaklo hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Jakob in a Tawpkhakna-ah A Deih

verses.text: Tua ahih ciangin Egypt gamsung Goshen leitangah Israel-te teng uh hi. Tua lai-ah amaute in neihsa ngah uh a, pungin tampi tak pha uh hi
Egypt gamah Jakob kum sawmlesagih nungta lai ahih manin ama khan' kum za leh kum sawmlilesagih ahi hi

Israel a sih ding hun a nai ciangin, amah in a tapa Josef samin ama kiangah, “Tu-in na muhna-ah maipha ka ngah leh, ka phei nuai-ah na khut hong koih in la, thumantak leh citakin kei nong bawl ding thu hong ciam in. Egypt-ah kei hong vui kei in la
ka pate tawh hong sial khawm in. Egypt panin kei hong puakhia in la, amau' kivuina munah kei hong vui in,” a ci hi. Amah in dawngin, “Na gen bangin ka gamta ding hi,” a ci hi
Amah in, “Kei' tungah hong kiciam in,” a ci hi. Amah zong a pa' tungah a kiciam hi. Tua ciangin Israel lungdamin a lupna lukhungah amahmah a kunsuk hi.
